data.name: 墮落聖女
data.detailed_description:
★《墮落聖女》為《女王的榮耀》系列作。

◆特色系統

　◇在環境設定裡能打開全CG模式,自由瀏覽HCG

　◇無壓力操作設計-快速的文字跳轉系統

◆故事

聖女薇歐拉來到這個城市見識到這個貧富差異極大的城市，因為對貧窮的民眾產生了悲憫的心情，想要利用聖導教傳授的知識，透過傳教來拯救這些平民，卻發現有潛伏的宗教在這裡活躍。

「薇歐拉…薇歐拉…」在探索過程不斷的聽到來自虛空的呼喚…

隨著故事的推進，持續地探索各個地區，逐漸發現背後的神秘組織，一步一步誘導著薇歐拉走入深淵並且逐漸探知其瘋狂的真相…

薇歐拉在不知情的狀況下投入邪神的懷抱， 在歷經無數苦難與幻覺後，已經分不清現實與幻境的薇歐拉，向著邪神祈禱，一步步走向墮落的深淵。

◆玩法

本遊戲為指令回合探索型ＡＶＧ，玩家將扮演聖女薇歐拉深入中世紀大城『崔翁普斯特』中傳教。玩家將會在《都城》《聖堂》《城內區》《遺民區》《貧民區》等地方認識各式各樣的人

透過《交談》《請求》《探索》《祈禱》《佈道》《救濟》等指令來探索與跟當地民眾交流

並且透過《邀請》《服侍》《交合》《儀式》等指令進行Ｈ事件。

隨著指令的執行，玩家將根據不同的數值或故事線，進入《諾曼線》《聖導線》《墮落線》《降臨線》等四個結局。

◆遊戲特色

◇30張基本CG，包含差分 120 張以上。

◇遊戲文字11萬字。
◇中世紀風格，指令回合模擬遊戲。
◇遊戲結局：４種

data.short_description: 「薇歐拉…薇歐拉…」聖女薇歐拉聽從來自虛空的呼喚，離開都城來到貧富差距極大的罪惡之城崔翁普斯特，那聲音欲將她一步步帶向墮落的深淵…
data.supported_languages:
繁體中文, 英文, 簡體中文, 法文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 俄文, 土耳其文, 日文*, 泰文, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲, 越南文, 韓文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: WIN10/XP
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9 compatible graphics card
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 256 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: WIN10/XP
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9 compatible graphics card
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間

data.name: Fallen Saint
data.detailed_description:
★ Fallen Saint is a story in the series of The Queen’s Glory.

◆Featured Systems

◇Full CG mode can be turned on in the environment setting, and HCG can be freely browsed.

◇Pressure-Free Operation Support one-click mouse operation-Fast text-to-text system

◆ Story

The Saint Viola arrived in the city to see the great disparity between the rich and the poor. She felt compassion for the poor people, and wanted to use the knowledge she learnt at the Holy Guides to save them through missionary work, but found a latent religion active here instead.

"Viola...Viola..." She kept hearing calls from the void as she explored...

As the story progressed, Viola continued to explore the various regions. She gradually discovered the mysterious organisation behind it, leading Viola step by step into the abyss and gradually uncovering its crazy truth...

Viola fell into the arms of the evil god without realising it. After countless hardships and illusions, Viola, no longer able to distinguish between reality and illusion, prayed to the evil god and walked into the abyss of depravity.

◆Gameplay Instructions

The game is a turn-based exploratory AVG in which the player takes on the role of the Saint Viola and enters a missionary in the medieval city of Triumphust. You will meet a variety of people in the “Capital”, the “Sanctuary”, the “Inner City”, the “Remnant”, and the “Slum”.

Through commands such as "Chat", "Request", "Explore", "Pray", "Sermon", and "Help", etc., the player can explore and communicate with the locals.
And through commands such as "Invite", "Serve", "Intercourse" and "Ritual", the player can command Viola to have sex.

As commands are executed, the player will enter four endings, “Norman Ending”, “Saint Ending”, “Fallen Ending” and “Descent Ending”, depending on the values or story line.

◆ Game Features

◇ 30 basic CGs, including more than 120 differentials
◇ Game text: 110,000
◇ A medieval style, turn-based simulation game.
◇ Game endings: 4 types

data.short_description: "Viola...Viola..." The Saint, Viola heeded the call from the void and left the capital city for Triumphust, the city of sin, where the disparity between the rich and the poor was great, and where the voice led her step by step to the abyss of degradation...
data.supported_languages:
Traditional Chinese, English, Simplified Chinese, French, German, Spanish - Spain, Russian, Turkish, Japanese*, Thai, Portuguese - Portugal, Portuguese - Brazil, Spanish - Latin America, Vietnamese, Korean
*languages with full audio support

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS *: WIN10/XP
  • Processor: 1.2 GHz
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: DirectX 9 compatible graphics card
  • DirectX: Version 9.0
  • Storage: 256 MB available space
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS *: WIN10/XP
  • Processor: 1.2 GHz
  • Memory: 8 GB RAM
  • Graphics: DirectX 9 compatible graphics card
  • DirectX: Version 9.0
  • Storage: 1 GB available space
